breakout_products.title: Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT
breakout_products.content: Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.

The system is built to help teams securely scale their operations across multiple integrated tools.

breakout_products.title: 出门问问首发AI协作平台！设计师、产品、程序员同框办公，老板还能直接指挥Agent干活
breakout_products.content: 智东西 作者 | 程茜 编辑 | 心缘 智东西4月22日报道，昨日下午，出门问问正式发布企业级AI原生协作平台CodeBanana。该平台让开发者、设计师、产品经理能够在同一个实时空间里共同编写代码、调试和构建产品。 CodeBanana的核心特点包括：Agent无处不在，每个项目自带专属Agent，即使私密的个人对话也有Agent参与；人与Agent都是团队正式成员；Agent以Coding为基础，都拥有代码执行能力。 出门问问创始人、CEO李志飞将CodeBanana定位为专为超级组织打造的操作系统。 他认为“超级个体能力x协同机制=超级组织”...
breakout_products.selection_reason: New AI-native collaboration platform integrating agents directly into the development workflow.
breakout_products.summary: Mobvoi has launched CodeBanana, an enterprise-level AI-native workspace that integrates autonomous agents alongside human developers, designers, and product managers to collaboratively build and debug software in real time.
breakout_products.display_title: Mobvoi Introduces CodeBanana as an Enterprise AI Collaboration Platform for Cross-Functional Teams
key_points: The platform provides a shared real-time environment for cross-functional teams to write code and develop products together.
AI agents act as formal team members with native code execution capabilities integrated into every project and private conversation.
CEO Li Zhifei envisions the system as an operating system designed to build super organizations through enhanced human-AI collaboration.

breakout_products.title: SpeakON
breakout_products.content: A MagSafe AI device for a post-keyboard world. Typing is the bottleneck. SpeakON removes it. A MagSafe AI device for iPhone — press once to speak into any app. No mic permission. No switching. Even works with your phone locked. Zero friction. Product categories: Wearables, AI notetakers, AI Dictation Apps.
breakout_products.selection_reason: Innovative MagSafe hardware device for frictionless AI dictation and interaction.
breakout_products.summary: This MagSafe-compatible AI wearable allows users to bypass typing by pressing a single button to dictate text directly into any iPhone app, even while the device is locked.
breakout_products.display_title: MagSafe AI Device Enables Frictionless Voice Dictation Across All iPhone Applications
key_points: The hardware attaches to the iPhone via MagSafe and inputs text into any application without requiring microphone permissions.
Users can activate the voice dictation feature with a single press, eliminating the need to switch between different apps.
The device functions seamlessly even when the phone is locked, providing a zero-friction alternative to traditional mobile typing.

breakout_products.title: Agent 可以被分享以后，协作自然而然发生 发现一个非常有意思的产品！ Bloome 可以把你本地的 Agent 和线上 Agent 拉群。 比如说龙虾、Claude Code 和 CodeX...
breakout_products.content: Agent 可以被分享以后，协作自然而然发生 发现一个非常有意思的产品！ Bloome 可以把你本地的 Agent 和线上 Agent 拉群。 比如说龙虾、Claude Code 和 CodeX 都能在一个群里协作。 这样的话，你完全可以让你多个 Agent 的上下文和能力都在一个群里协作完成。 系统会自带一个云端的 Agent，它的作用包括： 在你的电脑不在线时，帮你处理一些轻量的任务。 你可以把本地 Agent 的共享内容告诉它，由它来帮你处理。 而且在你需要本地 Agent 的时候，只要电脑开机，云端 Agent 也能把它们 @ 出来执行任务。 最神奇的是，我给他拉了群以后，我的线上 Agent 让我本地的 Codex Agent 执行任务。 叫了第一下，那个 Codex 没出来，他发了句“在吗”，我去，笑死我了！ 添加本地 Agent 非常简单，真正的一键操作： 点击右上角的加号，选择“创建 Agent” 进去点一下想要添加的 Agent 点击确定 就结束了，这个太方便了！门槛降得非常低了。 而且这里面还有一个功能，你能够给各种 Agent 拉群： 协作与交流 你只需要带一个二维码，就可以把你和你朋友的 Agent 拉到一个群里，让他们之间相互协作和交流。 多角色互动 你还能定义那种恶搞的 Agent，让各个不同角色的 Agent 进群去沟通。 主人互动 你和你朋友作为 Agent 的主人，也可以在群里沟通和交流，非常方便。 而且这个产品还非常开放。你除了能用它自己免费提供的 API 以外，还能添加自己任意的 API，它都允许，并不是必须要充钱才行。
breakout_products.selection_reason: Bloome enables cross-platform agent collaboration between local and cloud environments with low friction.
breakout_products.summary: Bloome is a new platform that lets users connect their local and cloud-based AI agents into shared group chats for seamless task collaboration and cross-agent communication.
breakout_products.display_title: Bloome Allows Users to Create Collaborative Group Chats for Local and Cloud AI Agents
key_points: Users can combine local agents with a built-in cloud agent that manages lightweight tasks while the host computer is offline.
The platform enables direct agent-to-agent interaction, allowing cloud models to actively ping local agents to execute specific commands.
It supports QR code sharing for multi-user agent collaboration and allows the integration of custom APIs without mandatory paywalls.

breakout_products.title: Cai
breakout_products.content: Press ⌥C on anything to run smart actions, locally. Press ⌥C on anything to run smart actions: AI prompts, shell scripts, GitHub issues, Linear tickets, or send results anywhere... All one keystroke away. Bring your own brain: bundled Ministral 3B for zero-setup local AI, any HuggingFace MLX model for Apple Silicon speed, or connect Ollama, LM Studio, Apple Intelligence, or OpenRouter. Free, MIT licensed. No cloud, no account, no telemetry. Product categories: App switcher, AI Workflow Automation.
breakout_products.selection_reason: Local-first AI workflow tool supporting multiple models with a focus on privacy.
breakout_products.summary: This privacy-focused utility allows users to trigger local AI models, shell scripts, and task management actions across any application using a single keystroke.
breakout_products.display_title: Open-Source Keystroke Utility Enables Local AI Workflows and Smart Actions on macOS
key_points: Triggers smart actions like AI prompts, shell scripts, and ticket creation via a universal keyboard shortcut.
Comes bundled with Ministral 3B for immediate local use and supports custom integrations with HuggingFace MLX, Ollama, and Apple Intelligence.
Operates entirely locally under an MIT license with zero cloud dependency, account requirements, or telemetry tracking.

breakout_products.title: Cloudflare ：Agent Readiness 评分来了！你的网站，AI 代理能"看懂"吗？
breakout_products.content: 今天，我们很兴奋地推出 isitagentready.com —— 一个帮网站主人搞清楚"我的站点对 AI 代理到底友不友好"的新工具。从怎么引导代理完成身份认证，到决定代理能看见什么内容、以什么格式

We’re also launching our 8th-gen TPUs to take on the most demanding agentic workloads. Congratulations to our @GoogleCloud team, and a huge thanks to our partners who are building the future with us.

llm.title: We’ve post trained a model on top of Qwen that achieves Pareto optimality on accuracy-cost curves...
llm.content: We’ve post trained a model on top of Qwen that achieves Pareto optimality on accuracy-cost curves. Unlike our previous post trained models, this model has been trained to be good at search and tool calls simultaneously, allowing us to unify the tool call router and summarization together in one model. The resulting model performs better than GPT and Sonnet in terms of cost efficiency to serve daily Perplexity queries in production. The production model runs on our own inference platform. We’re already serving a significant chunk of our daily traffic with this model and intend to have it serve all of default traffic pretty soon. More research to follow soon on models we’re training and deploying for Comet and Computer.
llm.selection_reason: Perplexity's new custom-trained model achieving Pareto optimality for search tasks.
llm.summary: Perplexity has post-trained a model on top of Qwen that unifies search and tool calls, achieving better cost efficiency than GPT and Sonnet for daily queries.
llm.display_title: Perplexity Deploys Cost-Efficient Post-Trained Qwen Model
key_points: The model achieves Pareto optimality on accuracy-cost curves.
It unifies the tool call router and summarization into a single model.
The model is already serving a significant portion of Perplexity's daily traffic on their own inference platform.

product_updates.title: We’re making it easier for organizations to scale up autonomous agents with the Agentic Data Clou...
product_updates.content: We’re making it easier for organizations to scale up autonomous agents with the Agentic Data Cloud. This AI-native architecture closes the gap between thinking and doing through: - A universal context engine that gives your agents a grounded source of truth about your business data - New agentic-first tools, so you can stop writing manual pipelines and start orchestrating - An open, cross-cloud Lakehouse, so agents can securely access your data no matter where it's stored #GoogleCloudNext

product_updates.title: Last fall, we launched Gemini Enterprise as a front door to AI in the workplace, enabling every c...
product_updates.content: Last fall, we launched Gemini Enterprise as a front door to AI in the workplace, enabling every customer and employee to use cutting-edge AI agents. Today at #GoogleCloudNext, we announced new features, including: - A new inbox in Gemini Enterprise to manage, monitor and act on your agent activities - Canvas, which lets you create and edit Google Docs and Slides without switching apps - Reusable “skills” for faster automation And more ↓
